description: Composition Brown formal striped trousers made of a poly/rayon blend fabric, has a flat front with two pockets on the sides, two welt pockets on the back with button closures, loops on the waist, reinforced stitch detailing along the crotch area, and a zipper and button closure Fitting Slim Fit; Straight leg Wash care Machine wash separately with cold water using a mild detergent Do not bleach or soak Line dry inside out in shade Warm iron iron: Do not iron on decorations There are certain occasions that call for formal wear. Designed for the unpretentious, the genesis Corporate Collection is for the man who arrests attention without a sound. Crafted from a poly/rayon blend, this pair of formal trousers is what you need to get the job done and is a great addition to your formal wardrobe. Pair it with a formal shirt, classy accessories and leather shoes. Model statistics Product is a size M on a model of height 6' and waist 32"
